utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five elements. Each one contains the necessary details—coverage description and costs (monthly and annual), and the total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four components: health_coverage (LifeFirst & HealthFirst), property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. From the ground-truth, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (physical and mental) has rating 9, and 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (physical and mental) has rating 8. Since the plan lists both LifeFirst and HealthFirst together, the health coverage combines those two, so we map both. For property_coverage, it matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9). For travel_coverage, the description fits 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) because it covers global adventure and medical assistance. For additional_services, it mentions adventure sports add-on, wellness programs, crisis support, and concierge services. These match to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), 'Emergency Mental Health Care' (rating 8), and 'Concierge Services' (rating 2) respectively.
